summary: Iteration 80 - Trigger.dev Tasks Admin UI (P0.2) and Agent Zero Context Härtung (P0.1) Testing Complete. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. Trigger.dev runs in FALLBACK mode (DeepSeek local) since TRIGGER_DEV_API_KEY is not configured. All 6 task cards display correctly with task runner, payload editor, and run history table.
critical_code_review_comments: Trigger.dev Tasks API correctly returns 6 tasks with descriptions and payload schemas
Fallback mode (DeepSeek local) works correctly when TRIGGER_DEV_API_KEY is not set
Task execution via POST /api/admin/trigger/run returns success=true with run_id and result
Run history is persisted in MongoDB and displayed in trigger-runs-table
DeepSeek is correctly configured as primary LLM (master_llm='deepseek')
Arcee AI is correctly configured as fallback
All 6 task cards have proper data-testid attributes (task-card-{id})
Task runner panel has data-testid='task-runner' with payload input and run button
Fallback-Mode banner clearly indicates 'Kein TRIGGER_DEV_API_KEY — Tasks laufen lokal über DeepSeek'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 verified Trigger.dev Tasks Admin UI (P0.2). The system runs in FALLBACK mode because TRIGGER_DEV_API_KEY is not configured - tasks execute locally via DeepSeek. All 6 tasks are available: deep-research, generate-report, generate-and-translate-copy, analyze-contract, competitor-monitor, generate-pdf-and-upload. The Tasks view is accessible via nav-tasks in sidebar. Run history shows completed runs with (lokal) indicator.

api_test_results.POST /api/admin/trigger/run: PASS - Executes task in fallback mode via DeepSeek

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are LIVE: DeepSeek (primary), Arcee AI (fallback). Trigger.dev runs in local fallback mode (no TRIGGER_DEV_API_KEY configured).
